source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Take a very long chain of beads connected by identical springs of spring constant $K$ and equilibrium length $a$, as shown in Fig. 1.93. Each bead is free to oscillate along the $x$ direction. All beads have mass $m$ except for one which has mass $m_{0}<m$. The mass of the spring is negligibly small. For a wave of wave vector $k$, what is the reflection probability when the wave hits the special bead? Hint for part (b): Try a solution of the form $x_{n}=A e^{i k a n}+B e^{-i k a n}$ for $n<0$, $x_{n}=C e^{i k a n}$ for $n>0$.
extraction_notes: question references "Fig. 1.93" and record marks vision_relevance as essential
image field contains a PIL object string placeholder rather than a file path or URL

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object string placeholder rather than a file path or URL

image_dependency: 题干显式引用“Fig. 1.93”，且上游标注 `requires_image=true`、`text_dominant=false`。
但题干已用文字完整描述了长弹簧-小球链、单个特殊质量点、传播方向与提示形式，图像更像结构示意而非唯一信息源。
资产登记显示有 1 张配图且 `registry_passed=true`，说明图像资源存在，但从文本字段看并非完全无法脱离图像作答。
multi_step: 要求从入射/反射/透射波的分段试探解出发，联立边界条件求出反射振幅比，再转成反射概率，属于明确的多步推导。
题干提示 `x_n=Ae^{ikan}+Be^{-ikan}` 与 `x_n=Ce^{ikan}`，表明需要分别处理缺陷点两侧并做匹配，而非单步读取。
最终答案是含三角函数与质量比的解析式，通常需要色散关系或离散振动方程配合代数化简。
verifiability: 答案类型为 `short_text`，且给出了单一明确的解析表达式 `|B/A|^2=...`，目标形式清晰。
该类物理题可通过符号推导、等价变形检查或极限情形（如 `m0 -> m`、`ka` 特定值）进行核验，可验证性较高。
不过解析式可能存在等价改写、符号约定或三角恒等变形，因此不是满分可验证。

candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Take a very long chain of beads connected by identical springs of spring constant $K$ and equilibrium length $a$, as shown in Fig. 1.93. Each bead is free to oscillate along the $x$ direction. All beads have mass $m$ except for one which has mass $m_{0}<m$. The mass of the spring is negligibly small. For a wave of wave vector $k$, what is the reflection probability when the wave hits the special bead? Hint for part (b): Try a solution of the form $x_{n}=A e^{i k a n}+B e^{-i k a n}$ for $n<0$, $x_{n}=C e^{i k a n}$ for $n>0$.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: question references "Fig. 1.93" and record marks vision_relevance as essential

metadata.reasoning_chain:
Using the trial solution
ewline $x_{n}=(A e^{ika n}+B e^{-ika n})e^{-i\omega t}$ for $n \leq 0$ and $x_{n}=C e^{i(ka n-\omega t)}$ for $n \geq 0$,
ewline we find from continuity at $n=0$ that $C=A+B$. Substituting into the equation of motion for the $n=0$ bead,
ewline $\ddot{x}_{0}=- rac{K}{m_{0}}(2x_{0}-x_{1}-x_{-1})$,
ewline leads to
ewline $ rac{\omega^{2} m_{0}}{K}(A+B)=2(A+B)-(A+B)e^{ika}-A e^{-ika}-B e^{ika}$.
ewline Solving this for $A$ in terms of $B$ gives
ewline $A=\left[ rac{m_{0}}{m-m_{0}}- rac{m}{m-m_{0}} rac{1-e^{ika}}{1-\cos(ka)}ight]B=\left\{-1+ rac{i m \sin(ka)}{(m-m_{0})[1-\cos(ka)]}ight\}B$.
ewline Hence, the reflection probability is
ewline $\left| rac{B}{A}ight|^{2}=\left\{1+\left( rac{m}{m-m_{0}}ight)^{2}\left[ rac{\sin(ka)}{1-\cos(ka)}ight]^{2}ight\}^{-1}$.
